Blade.name: Hammer Slam
Blade.description: Performs a narrow-range attack around the targets as if you are slamming them down. Guarantees a critical hit on targets immobilized by Flinch or other status ailments. MP Cost becomes 0 if used consecutively.

Blade.name: Cleaving Attack
Blade.description: Swings the sword horizontally to deal with multiple opponents. If 2 or more targets are involved, the power will increase proportionally and consumed MP will be restored.

Blade.name: Storm Blaze
Blade.description: Attacks enemies in a straight line with an aerial slash. Wind Power will accumulate when a normal attack hits. Wind Power is consumed upon skill activation. Power, attack range, and MP recovery increases according to the amount consumed.

Blade.name: Garde Blade
Blade.description:
A defense technique using a two-handed sword. Boosts Physical/Magic Resistance and improves Guard ability for 70 seconds. Recovers Guard Power a bit when the buff is applied.
Overwriting won't trigger this recovery.
2-Handed Sword
While the effect is active, the weapon's refinement value will work as the shield's refinement value.
VIT affects Guard Power Recovery and it won't recover beyond 100%.
Nullifies ailments causing immobility when Guard is timed perfectly.
The buff ends immediately when Guard Power is used up and it can't be used again for some time.

Blade.name: Ogre Slash
Blade.description:
Deals damage to the target and after a short while, causes an explosion at the target's feet, dealing additional damage. If the conditions are met, Ogre Power will be accumulated and consumed upon skill activation to increase the power and buff.
2-Handed Sword
Starting a battle, stepping on the warning area, taking damage, or perfectly timing Guard will restore Ogre Power (
max 20
).
Rampage's performance is boosted while the buff is active.
Mitigates the drawbacks of Berserk while the buff is active.
Slightly restores HP based on the MP consumed while the buff is active.

Blade.name: Hard Hit
Blade.description:
Brutally hit the target with the weapon. Chance to inflict [Flinch] on the target.
1-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with Dual Swords]
Flinch Rate +50%
2-Handed Sword
Power +50

Blade.name: Astute
Blade.description:
Strongly hit the target in rapid motion. Critical Rate +25 when this skill is activated.
1-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with Dual Swords]
MP Cost -100
2-Handed Sword
Power +50
Boosts Critical Rate Buff

Blade.name: Trigger Slash
Blade.description:
Infuses power into the sword while slashing the target. Enhances Attack MP Heal until the next skill is activated. Using this skill will speed up motion 1 time.
1-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with Dual Swords]
Perfect Aim
2-Handed Sword
Power +100

Blade.name: Rampage
Blade.description:
Furiously and consecutively attack a target. Greatly enhance normal attacks 10 times and a strong attack will be activated after that.
Unable to be used redundantly.
1-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with Dual Swords]
Normal Attack Power +5 - +50
2-Handed Sword
Finish Blow +400

Blade.name: Meteor Breaker
Blade.description:
Strong attack like a meteor. Chance to inflict [Dizzy] on a target and generate Area of Effect when landing. Become invincible when activating the skill.
1-Handed Sword
2nd Hit Power increases depending on DEX.
Dizzy Rate +75%
Dual Swords
Dizzy Rate +75%
2-Handed Sword
1st Hit Power +200
1st Hit Power increases depending on STR.

Blade.name: Shut-Out
Blade.description:
A merciless blow. If the target is afflicted by Flinch/Tumble/Stun and not bleeding, the damage dealt will increase and the target will be inflicted with [Bleed].
1-Handed Sword
Power increases further depending on DEX.
Dual Swords
Power increases further depending on AGI.
2-Handed Sword
As the increase in base power depends on the skill level, the increase will be very small when the condition is met.

Blade.name: Lunar Slash
Blade.description:
Slashes target and magic blade will deal additional damage after a slight delay.
Magic blade may inflict [Fatigue].
2-Handed Sword
Performs an additional attack if another attack skill is used. This additional attack is unable to inflict [Fatigue], but Critical Rate increases according to the skill level.

Blade.name: Sonic Blade
Blade.description:
Thrust enemies by quickly moving toward them. Range and Critical Rate increase as the skill levels up. Become more powerful by using it consecutively.
Sonic Blade changes to Super Sonic Blade when used while its buff is active
1-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with Dual Swords]
Activation Range +4m
Boosts Critical Rate
2-Handed Sword
Power +50
Range (Horizontal) +2m

Blade.name: Spiral Air
Blade.description:
Sharply thrust the target causing wind slashes. No critical damage. When Spiral Air hits a target, Critical Damage increases for a few seconds.
1-Handed Sword
Boosts Critical Damage Buff (
Except with Dual Swords
)
2-Handed Sword
Power +50

Blade.name: Sword Tempest
Blade.description:
A strong slash that generates a tempest. The tempest will deal damage over time. Enemies will be sucked into it once.
1-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with Dual Swords]
Whirlwind Power increases depending on DEX.
2-Handed Sword
Bullet Power +100
Bullet Power increases depending on STR.

Blade.name: Buster Blade
Blade.description:
Add aura and slash consecutively. Weapon ATK increases for a few seconds when activating Buster Blade. Restore a small amount of HP when the buff is added. The buff is not overwritten.
Buster Blade will not overwrite an existing Buster Blade buff
1-Handed Sword
Power increases depending on DEX.
Heal Amount increases depending on VIT.
Dual Swords
Heal Amount increases depending on VIT.
2-Handed Sword
Power Increases depending on STR.
Shield
Weapon ATK and Heal Amount increase based on shield ability.

Blade.name: Aura Blade
Blade.description:
Slashes and clears your surroundings with a blade surrounded by an aura. The power of the next skill used is 1.2x stronger.
Grants Additional Melee to weapon while active.
1-Handed Sword
Buffs will not be consumed.
Extends the buffs of Aura Blade by 10 seconds when getting the buffs of "Buster Blade".
The power of Buster Blade increases based on the level acquired.
Dual Swords
The power of the next skill used becomes 1.1x stronger.
2-Handed Sword
The Additional Melee granted gets reduced to 50%.
The power of the next skill used becomes 1.3x stronger.

Blade.name: Sword Mastery
Blade.description: Get better at swordsmanship. ATK of One/Two-Handed Swords increases.

Blade.name: Quick Slash
Blade.description: Shorten the Attack Intervals of One/Two-Handed Swords.

Blade.name: Sword Techniques
Blade.description: Learn the mastership of swords. The damage dealt of Blade Skill increases.

Blade.name: War Cry
Blade.description:
Perform a rallying cry. Increases ATK for a while. Removes status ailment: [Fear].
1-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with Dual Swords]
Duration +50sec
2-Handed Sword
Boosts ATK

Blade.name: Berserk
Blade.description:
Stop thinking and wield the weapon like a berserker. Increase Normal Attack Power/Attack Speed/Critical Rate for a few seconds and greatly decrease Stability/DEF/MDEF. Rampage is not removed by status ailments while it is in effect.
1-Handed Sword
Reduce the decrease of Stability.
Reduce the decrease of DEF. (
Except Dual Swords
)
Reduce the decrease of MDEF. (
Except Dual Swords
)
Duration +20sec
2-Handed Sword
Boosts Critical Rate
Reduces the decrease of Stability.
Duration +20sec

Blade.name: Gladiate
Blade.description:
Reduces the damage received for a certain number of times for 10 seconds. Slightly restores MP when damage is reduced.
Restores 10 MP per number of damage reduction effects remaining when the time is up.
1-Handed Sword
The amount of MP recovered increases when damage gets reduced.
Dual Swords
The amount of MP recovered is halved when damage gets reduced.
Damage reduction is doubled.
2-Handed Sword
The amount of MP recovered slightly increases when damage gets reduced.
Damage reduction is doubled.
Shield
Damage reduction is doubled.

Blade.name: Swift Attack
Blade.description:
Kick while pretending to attack with a sword. This skill has "normal attack proration". MP Cost for the next skill used will be reduced when the skill reaches its maximum level.
Dual Swords
MP Cost -100
Chance to make target Tumble.

Shot.name: Power Shot
Shot.description:
Shoots the target with stronger power. The charge time reduces as the skill levels up. Chance to inflict [Tumble] on the target. Critical rate increases on Slowed targets.
Bow
Tumble Rate +40%
Bowgun
Charge Time is shortened.
Tumble Rate -40%

Shot.name: Bullseye
Shot.description:
Consecutively shoots at a point. The damage dealt increases attack by attack.
Bow
Power +75
Bowgun
Boost on Physical Pierce

Shot.name: Arrow Rain
Shot.description:
Shoots a lot of arrows to the sky. The arrows fall down at intervals and deal damage.
Bow
Boost on the Number of Attacks+
Boosts on Attack Speed
Range (Radius) +2m
Bowgun
Power +70

Shot.name: Snipe
Shot.description:
Snipe a weak point. The charge time decreases as the skill levels up. Chance to inflict [Armor Break]. 100% chance to hit Blind targets.
Bow
Power +200
Armor Break Rate +30%
Reduction on Critical Rate Debuff
Bowgun
Power +300
Stability +20%
A little shorter Charge Time
Armor Break Rate -60%

Shot.name: Cross Fire
Shot.description:
Charge Skill (
5 Levels
). Attack toward a target and deal damage to the enemies on the straight line. Power increases as the charge level increases and add an attack. Add another attack by meeting certain conditions.
Bow
Power +50
Power increases depending on DEX.
Range (Horizontal) +1m
Bowgun
Power of Additional Bullets +100
Penetrability of additional bullets increases depending on DEX.

Shot.name: Piercing Shot
Shot.description:
An arrow that pierces even the strongest defense. Aims and attacks in a straight line with a Charge Skill (
5 Levels
). You can move and adjust the direction with Evasion. Each hit (except for Graze) increases its performance and slightly restores MP.
Bowgun
Gains invincibility for 1.5 seconds when you start or resume charging.
*This invincibility is removed when a skill is activated.

Shot.name: Vanquisher
Shot.description:
Delivers a powerful blow to a small area. The power gets dispersed if there are multiple targets within the area. The closer you are to the target, the more Guard and Evasion are disregarded.
Bow
If you have the Ignite debuff, activating the skill will remove it, guarantee hits, and stop power from being dispersed.
Bowgun
If you have the Ignite debuff, activating the skill will remove it, guarantee hits, and stop power from being dispersed.
If you have 5 or more "Overheat stacks" from Twin Storm, 5 stacks will be consumed to enhance Vanquisher.
Magic Device
The power boost from DEX is lost.
Power increases depending on INT.
Dagger
It changes from an AoE to a single-target attack.

Shot.name: Twin Storm
Shot.description:
Greatly enhances normal attack and also increases movement speed.
Overheat stacks each time a normal attack hits, and the skill status can be removed by reactivating the skill.
Bowgun
"Overheat stack" buff
The power of normal attacks, Shot Skills, and Hunter Skills increases as Overheat stacks build up.
Stability decreases if Overheat stacks build up too much.
Magic Device
Performs normal attacks with MATK if MATK is higher than ATK.
Dagger
Always applies the power of close-range attack or long-range attack, whichever is higher.

Shot.name: Retrograde Shot
Shot.description:
A technique of shooting enemies while moving backward. Attacks in a linear range and the target with the most HP that gets hit will be marked.
If you press the button for moving forward, the skill will activate without moving backward.
Bow
[Effects of the mark]
Lowers the dodge rate of the marked target.
*The mark is visible to the party members too.
Deals additional damage when the marked target is hit with a Shot Skill or Hunter Skill and the power continues to increase up to a certain number of times.

Shot.name: Quick Loader
Shot.description:
Activates Cross Fire and increases its charge by 1 level if is not fully charged.
This skill is not overwritten.
Bow
Activating the skill will also activate the Sneak Attack that has been acquired at the same time.
Activation level will not exceed the level of Quick Loader.
Bowgun
Activating the skill will also activate the Sneak Attack that has been acquired at the same time.
Activation level will not exceed the level of Quick Loader.
No. of Stacks Gained -1

Shot.name: Moeba Shot
Shot.description:
Shoots with sticky liquid. Water element attack.
Dual Element
with
Arrow
. Chance to inflict [Slow Down] on the target and when successful, damage dealt greatly increases.
Bow
Slow Down Rate +30%
Bowgun
Power +50
Slow Down Rate -30%

Shot.name: Paralysis Shot
Shot.description:
Shoots the target with a paralysis poison. Wind element attack.
Dual Element
with
Arrow
. Chance to inflict [Paralysis] on the target and when successful, damage dealt greatly increases. Increase your Stability for a while.
Bow
Power +100
Paralyze Rate +20%
Bowgun
Power +150
Paralyze Rate -20%
Arrow
Paralyze Rate +20%

Shot.name: Smoke Dust
Shot.description:
An attack with a smokescreen. Dark Element attack.
Dual Element
with
Arrow
. Chance to inflict [Blind] on the target and when successful, damage dealt greatly increases. Increase accuracy rate for a while.
Bow
Power +200
Blind Rate +20%
Bowgun
Power +250
Blind Rate -20%
Arrow
Blind Rate +20%

Shot.name: Arm Break
Shot.description:
Attack a target's arm and reduce its attack power. Neutral element attack.
Dual Element
with
Arrow
. Chance to inflict
[Lethargy]
on the target and when successful, damage dealt greatly increases.
Bow
Power +300
Lethargy Rate +20%
Bowgun
Power +350
Lethargy Rate -20%
Arrow
Lethargy Rate +20%

Shot.name: Parabola Cannon
Shot.description:
Attacks by firing a projectile in a parabolic trajectory. It's an AoE attack, and the farther the projectile is from the target, the faster it travels. Low chance to inflict [Silence].
Bow
[Get the same effect when used with a Bowgun]
Hold an arrow key to perform a roll when the skill is activated.
When it hits or reaches the target, it becomes a trap and activates 1 second later.
The trap will greatly increase the chance to inflict [Silence].

Shot.name: Spread Shot
Shot.description:
Attacks using 5 skillfully controlled arrows. Chance to inflict a status ailment (
weapon element
) on the target. Each hit on the same target slightly improves its performance. You can also change the direction the arrows are fired by using the directional keys.
Bow
The chance to inflict a status ailment is doubled.
Additional hits from "Retrograde Shot" can occur up to 4 times.
Bowgun
The power is doubled when activated using a directional key (left/right).

Shot.name: Shot Mastery
Shot.description: Gets better at using bows and bowguns. ATK of Bows and Bowguns increases.

Shot.name: Long Range
Shot.description: You become good at attacking from distance. Damage dealt from 8 meters or more away increases.

Shot.name: Quick Draw
Shot.description: Quickly prepare for the next move. Chance to restore MP a little when succeeding in attacking with a skill.

Shot.name: Decoy Shot
Shot.description: Generate a clone and make it attack. The clone attacks enemies attacking within the range. The clone's attack is normal attack but it has no Proration.

Shot.name: Element Starter
Shot.description:
The element of bow or bowgun will be activated at the same time as the arrow.
*Not valid for dual element skills.
Gets a small recovery barrier each time you deal damage to targets with the element you are weak to.

Shot.name: Samurai Archery
Shot.description:
Slightly raises ATK and stability if a bow and a katana are equipped at the same time.
If a normal attack is performed with the katana, the accuracy of the next skill used increases.

Shot.name: Sneak Attack
Shot.description:
Hides yourself and diverts aggro away from you. After the skill is activated, a certain number of attacks don't generate aggro.
Bow
MP Cost -200
Bowgun
MP Cost -200

Shot.name: Hunting Buddy
Shot.description:
Summons your companion to fight alongside you. It attacks every few seconds, causing normal attack proration. The effect that enhances your companion's next attack will stack when you hit the target with a Shot Skill.
Bow
[Get the same effect when used with a Bowgun]
Unless your entire party is wiped out, your companion will use First Aid before leaving the battle when you are knocked out.

Shot.name: Fatal Shot
Shot.description: A shot skill that pierces through a strong armor. It's a unique attack with a high critical rate, but low accuracy. If it hits the target right, the tap time to break monster's part will be extended.

Magic.name: Magic: Arrows
Magic.description:
Shoot small magic arrows. The arrows increase as the skill levels up.
Staff
Power +25
Magic Device
Boost on the Number of Attacks

Magic.name: Magic: Javelin
Magic.description:
Drop a large magic javelin on the target. Chance to inflict a status ailment. The status ailment depends on the element.
Element: [Ailment]

Magic.name: Magic: Lances
Magic.description:
Shoot magic lances one after another. The lances increase as the skill levels up. Chance to inflict [Stop] on the target.
Staff
Power +150
Power increases depending on INT.
3x Stop Rate
Magic Device
Power increases depending on INT.

3x Stop Rate

Magic.name: Magic: Impact
Magic.description:
Attack enemies around you with a shock wave. Halves MP cost of the next skill. The effect will become weak if you consecutively use this skill.
Staff
Tumble Rate +25%
Magic Device
Power +250

Magic.name: Magic: Finale
Magic.description:
Super wide area of effect. Deal greater damage to enemies near the center. Cast Time is long and unable to reduce it by CSPD. Generate Aggro while casting.
Magic: Finale is unaffected by [Chain Cast]
Staff
Power +750
Power increases depending on INT.
Magic Device
Power increases depending on INT.
4x Range (Radius) for 1st HIT
2x Range (Radius) for 2nd and 3rd HIT

Magic.name: Chronos Shift
Magic.description:
A forbidden technique of turning back time and deploying magic again. Instantly reactivates the last magic skill used.
After using this skill, you need to wait for some time to be able to use it again.

Magic.name: Magic: Laser
Magic.description:
A technique to simplify magic and release its power with the caster's ability. Power increases based on the remaining MP when activated. Low chance to inflict a status ailment (
weapon element
). After activation, your Magic Pierce slightly increases.
Staff
Slightly boosts the increase in Magic Pierce.
Magic Device
The chance to inflict a status ailment is 1.5 times higher.
1-Handed Sword
The chance to inflict a status ailment is halved.

Magic.name: Magic: Wall
Magic.description:
Create a magic wall at the feet. Deal damage and knock back enemies.
Staff
Power +30
Magic Device
Range (Radius) +1m

Magic.name: Magic: Blast
Magic.description:
Set off a blast by concentrating magic power. Chance to inflict a status ailment. The status ailment depends on the element.
Element: [Ailment]

Magic.name: Magic: Storm
Magic.description:
A magic to generate a storm. Enemies will be sucked into it. Strong monsters may not be sucked into it.
Staff
Power +100
Magic Device
Range (Radius) +2m

Magic.name: Magic: Burst
Magic.description:
Releases enhanced magic power. Becomes invincible as the skill activates. May Knock Back monsters except bosses. Using Magic Skills shortens its Cast Time.
Staff
Power increases depending on INT.
Invincibility duration increases.
Magic Device
Power increases depending on INT.
Max Attack Range increases depending on the skill level.
Invincibility duration increases if
Main: Magic Device

Magic.name: Magic: Magic Cannon
Magic.description:
A magic cannon that mows down enemies in a straight line (
Charge Skill
). Charge it to increase its power and hit count. Using a skill that involves casting will speed up the charging. When charged over 100%, it may pierce through Guard.
Staff
Power increases depending on INT.
Magic Device
Increases the charge bonus for skill power
Increases attack range.

Magic.name: Magic: Crash
Magic.description:
Summons 3 little meteorites. When hitting the target, each meteorite may drop down again up to 2 times with diminishing power, but a higher chance of inflicting [Armor Break] or [Dizzy].
Staff
Power increases depending on INT.
Increases the chance of inflicting a status ailment.
Range (Radius) +0.5m
Magic Device
Greatly increases the chance of inflicting a status ailment.
Range (Radius) +1.5m

Magic.name: Magic Mastery
Magic.description: Get better at using magic weapons. ATK of Staffs and Magic Devices increases.

Magic.name: Magic Knife
Magic.description: Sends out magic daggers to contain enemy. This skill has "normal attack proration". Guarantees a hit with a small amount of MP recovered. Additional attack with normal attack proration increases when it becomes Lv10.

Magic.name: Qadal
Magic.description:
A forbidden technique that places a heavy burden on the mind and body. Consumes current HP and Max HP (random value) to halve the MP Cost of the next skill used and guarantee critical.
If the burden gets too heavy from repeated use, then...
Staff
When MaxHP gets reduced due to this skill, the power of magic skills will gradually increase over time.
If Qadal's effect ends because you get knocked out or move to another map, the power increase will be reset.

Magic.name: Spell Calibration
Magic.description:
The ability to adjust magic to suit your needs. Allows you to adjust certain Magic Skills up to Skill Tree Lv3.
*It doesn't affect Enchanted Spell.

Magic.name: MP Charge
Magic.description:
Restore MP by charging magic power. The charging time reduces as the skill levels up.
Unlike other skills, CSPD can only partially reduce this skill's Cast Time (up to a maximum 1 second reduction at 1000 CSPD); negative CSPD does not affect the cast time
Staff
Charge Time is shortened.
Magic Device
Charge Time is shortened a little.
MP Heal Amount +50

Magic.name: Chain Cast
Magic.description:
Efficiently cast magic. The cast speed of the magic skill used after "Magic: Arrows" increases.
Additional effect granted with staff or magic device (main).
Staff
Each time an attack skill that has a casting time hits, Casting speed will increase, MATK will slightly increase, and an effect that boosts magic stability can be earned up to 10 times.
Magic Device
Each time an attack skill that has a casting time hits, Casting speed will increase, MATK will increase, and an effect that slightly boosts magic stability can be earned up to 10 times.

Magic.name: Power Wave
Magic.description:
Shoot a magic wave if the target is out of range. Available from 5m or less away. The range extends up to 10m as the skill levels up. Attack MP Recovery is applied to this skill.
Staff
Power +40
Activation Range +2m
Magic Device
Power +70

Magic.name: Maximizer
Magic.description:
Greatly restore MP. Cast Time is shortened as the skill levels up. If you use MP Charge before this skill, the Cast Time of Maximizer will be shortened according to the skill level of MP Charge when using the skill with a
Staff
or
Magic Device
.
Staff
MP Recovery Amount +500
Magic Device
MP Recovery Amount +700

Magic.name: Rapid Charge
Enchanted Barrier
Magic.description:
Creates a barrier to protect yourself. If you are inside the barrier, damage will be absorbed. Beside, you won't flinch while casting and aggro from MP consumption will be reduced.
Restoring MP inside the barrier will restore the barrier's HP too.
Staff
[Get the same effect when used with a Magic Device]
INT and weapon performance increase the barrier's HP.
Damage absorbed is between 50-100% based on the type of damage.
Inside the barrier, damage taken is greatly decreased, Action Speed increases, and the buff count of Magic: Burst increases a lot.
The cast time of Magic: Finale becomes shorter inside the barrier.

Magic.name: Magic: Guardian Beam
Magic.description: Emits light to protect the caster. While active, magic attacks will be executed at a certain time such as after other magic skills are cast or after dealing damage to an enemy.

Martial.name: Smash
Martial.description:
A powerful hit. Chance to inflict [Flinch] on the target.
Knuckle
Power +50
Skill Power +25
Flinch Rate +25%

Martial.name: Bash
Martial.description:
Strikes a heavy blow on the head. Chance to inflict [Stun] on the target.
Knuckle
Power +50
Skill Power +50
Stun Rate +25%

Martial.name: Shell Break
Martial.description:
A straight punch that penetrates hard armor. The damage dealt increases as the target's DEF is higher. Low chance to inflict [Armor Break]. Recover MP if it succeeds.
Knuckle
Power +50
Skill Power +150
Boost on Physical Pierce
[The following effect is for Main Equipment Only]

Martial.name: Heavy Smash

A very powerful hit. Chance to inflict [Lethargy] to the target. Deal additional damage to the target that has [Armor Break].

Shoots out the energy stored inside. Chance to inflict [Fear] to the target. Charge time is shortened depending on the skill level.

manual only
) while using certain Martial skills. After activating it, you need to wait before you can activate it again.
Not available for some skills that perform special actions.

Martial.name: Mountain Press
Martial.description:
A powerful shoulder strike. Chance to inflict [Stun] on the target.
*If the stun debuff is prevented due to active resistance, the buff effect from the skill "Aggravate" will be applied.
Sonic Wave

Unleashes the demon power that is hidden inside. While active, ATK increases and if you receive damage, MP will be used to mitigate the damage,
but in exchange, you will lose ATK MP Recovery and MP Cost of all skills except Martial and Crusher skills will increase.

Martial.name: Seismic Stomp
Martial.description:
Throws your opponent off balance with a heavy stomp. Chance to inflict [Flinch] on the target. If successful, a large amount of MP will be restored.
Spin Sweep

Martial.name: Spin Sweep
Martial.description:
Trips your opponent with a leg sweep. Chance to inflict [Tumble] on the target.
If successful, you will perform additional attacks and gain a buff for a few seconds.
All Weapons
Evasion will be slightly restored when the buff is gained. The buff lasts for a few seconds and during this time, movement disruption due to [Slow], [Stop] and pull attacks will be prevented.
Flash Blink

Martial.name: Flash Blink
Martial.description: Sends out a residual image to attack. This skill attacks with "normal attack proration". The hit count increases according to the number of Evasions used. The power of the next close range attack increases.

Martial.name: Martial Mastery
Martial.description: Gets better at using Knuckles. ATK of Knuckles increases.

Martial.name: Martial Discipline
Martial.description: Deepens understanding of Knuckles. Increases attack speed of Knuckles. Increases damage of Knuckle skills a little.

Martial.name: Chakra
Martial.description:
Restores MP a little and adds a buff to reduce the next damage for a few seconds. Increases Attack MP Recovery a little during the effect. Effective on party members.
Knuckle
Mp Recovery Amount +50
Boost on Damage Reduction
Duration +10sec

Martial.name: Energy Control
Martial.description:
Controls the flow of energy and turns it aside. Nullifies the damage received while performing it and receives the buffs of Chakra except the MP Recovery effect.
*The level of Chakra that activates will not surpass the level of Energy Control acquired.
Knuckle
[The following effects are for Main Equipment Only]
If successful, Weapon ATK and stability will increase for a certain period of time.
Together with the skill "Annihilator", this Weapon ATK increase is up to +50%.

Martial.name: Aggravate
Martial.description: Keenly attacks the target again. Chance to deal additional damage with normal attacks of Knuckles.

Martial.name: Strong Chase Attack
Martial.description:
Enhances the power of small attacks.
Increases your accuracy and enhances the additional damage of [Aggravate].
Knuckle
[The following effect is for Main Equipment Only
]
Raises Accuracy further.
Grants Physical Pierce that depends on skill level to the additional damage of Aggravate.

Martial.name: Slide
Martial.description: Slides at a high speed to cut the distance and move closer to enemy. The accuracy of the next skill used will increase.

DualSword.name: Dual Sword Mastery
DualSword.description: You can equip 2 One-Handed Swords. Reduces the decline in Accuracy Rate and Critical Rate as this skill levels up.

DualSword.name: Twin Slash
DualSword.description: Slash the target with the swords. Increases critical damage.

DualSword.name: Spinning Slash
Phantom Slash
Aerial Cut
DualSword.description:
A sword technique that releases windy blades. Dual Element with (
One-Handed Sword
). While deploying Spinning Slash,
press the button to move forward
and 200 MP will be consumed additionally to unleash powerful attacks.
Dual Swords
The power of Aerial Cut depends on the level of Spinning Slash acquired.
Increased critical damage from Twin Slash acquired will apply to the additional attacks, which is further increased if the target is afflicted by Blind. But the further it is (8m or more), the smaller the value applied.

DualSword.name: Cross Parry
DualSword.description: Attack a target parrying the target's attack. Reduce Physical/Magic damage while the skill is in action. Enhance ATK and ASPD for 30 seconds when reducing damage.

DualSword.name: Charging Slash
DualSword.description: Charges toward the target using two swords. Passes through the target and deals damage to the enemies in a straight line. Categorized as an Unsheathe Attack.

DualSword.name: Shadowstep
DualSword.description: Quickly move behind a target's back. Enhance Attack MP Recovery until the next skill. Increase Critical Rate of skill attack one time.

DualSword.name: Shining Cross
Lunar Misfortune
Twin Buster Blade
DualSword.description:
Consecutive double slash surrounded by an aura. A two-stage attack with high critical potential.
Performs a chain of slashes first, then an AoE that grows stronger as more targets are involved.
Dual Swords
Get the same buff effects if Buster Blade has been acquired.

DualSword.name: Reflex
DualSword.description:
Greatly raises Evasion Recharge for a short time. Decreases DEF and MDEF a lot.
Dual Swords
Duration +90sec

DualSword.name: Flash Blast
DualSword.description:
Dual Element (
One Handed Sword
). Enhance Unsheathe Power for a short period of time and add a powerful counter when activating Evasion. It is activated when using [Shadowstep].
Dual Swords
Boost on Weapon ATK Buff
Duration +100sec
1-Handed Sword
Power +50
Range (Radius) +1m

DualSword.name: Storm Reaper
DualSword.description: Attacks the target while jumping back swiftly. The power of the next close-range attack increases based on the distance you've jumped back. Invincible while jumping back.

DualSword.name: Dual Sword Control
DualSword.description: Increases ASPD of Dual Swords. Reduces the disadvantages of Dual Swords.

DualSword.name: Godspeed
DualSword.description:
Enhances AGI and Unsheathe Attacks such as
First Attack, Evasion Attacks and certain skills.
Dual Swords
Unsheathe Attack +10%

DualSword.name: Saber Aura
DualSword.description:
The two blades emit a divine light. Increase various stats and movement speed. Continuously use HP while the effect is active. The effect ends when you become unable to use HP.
Unable to use redundantly.

DualSword.name: Crescent Saber
DualSword.description:
A special skill that can be activated while Saber Aura is active. Restores HP and the number of Evasions. Greatly raises Critical Rate and always halves MP Cost except for magic skills.
However, if you take damage from an enemy...

DualSword.name: Aerial Slay
DualSword.description:
Slashes your enemy while trifling with them. When activated with a combo (
except as opener
), the required MP becomes 100.
You can move with the directional keys while the skill is active.
Knuckle
[Get the same effect when used with a dagger]
Activates in Swift state.
Shield
Gains resistance to damage and immobility that depends on your shield's refinement value while active.
The effect of the skill "Fareth" will not be lost when moving with Aerial Slay.
Magic Device
Can be activated even when you are a certain distance away from the target.
Changes to Magic Damage.
Arrow
[Get the same effect when used with a Ninjutsu Scroll]
Can be activated even when you are a certain distance away from the target.
Dual Swords
Aggro from MP consumption will be greatly reduced for 5 seconds.
Horizon Cut

DualSword.name: Horizon Cut
DualSword.description:
Surprises your enemy with a swift backhand slash. Restores half of the MP consumed by your next skill. The required MP becomes 300 when used as a combo opener and 0 when used as a combo finisher.
You will tumble if you take damage while it is active.
Sting Blade

DualSword.name: Sting Blade
DualSword.description:
Closes the distance with a very sharp thrust. As long as it is not a Graze, hitting the target will boost your piercing power.
The power increases further based on the piercing power that exceeds the maximum value.

Halberd.name: Flash Stab
Halberd.description:
Sharply attack an enemy with a quick movement.
Halberd
Boost on Activation Speed.

Halberd.name: Cannon Spear
Halberd.description: Attack an enemy by throwing the halberd. The range increases as the skill levels up.

Halberd.name: Dragon Tail
Halberd.description: Whirl around the Halberd and swipe enemies. While active, damage taken will be reduced 2 times. Chance to inflict [Tumble]. Unable to inflict Tumble on boss monsters.

Halberd.name: Dive Impact
Halberd.description: The Halberd thrusted breaks the earth in time. Generate a mass explosion and deal additional damage after a while with a chance to inflict [Dazzled] when the skill is activated. Become invincible when activating the skill.

Halberd.name: Dragon Tooth
Halberd.description: Jump toward a target and attack. After using the skill, you will return to the original place. It has high Defense Ignorance and Critical Rate but has no bonus on power.

Halberd.name: Draconic Charge
Halberd.description:
Unleashes the rage of a dragon. Activates when it is full or when you move. Accumulates more rage if you sense danger when charging.
Be careful not to miss as the range of the charge attack is only 8 meters.

Halberd.name: Deadly Spear
Halberd.description:
Accurately thrust an enemy and deal fatal damage. It takes time to activate, but it ignores certain amount of defense and has a high chace to inflict critical damage, and when it happens, the MP Cost for the next skill used is halved.
Halberd
Power +20
1 Handed Sword
Reduction on Critical Rate

Halberd.name: Strike Stab
Halberd.description:
Thrust an enemy with a quick movement. The damage increases if the target has a status ailment. Have a low chance to deal critical.
Halberd
Skill Power +300
2x Additional Damage Power with Status Ailment
1 Handed Sword
Reduction on Critical Rate

Halberd.name: Chronos Drive
Halberd.description: Repeat the fact that you penetrated a target. Grant a buff to restore small amount of MP and deal damage over time to the target for a few seconds.

Halberd.name: Infinite Dimension
Halberd.description:
Repeated spear attacks that transcend time and space. Repeatedly performs wide-ranging attacks around a target. Chance to inflict [Dazzled].
If Chronos Drive is in effect, extra MP will be recovered.

Halberd.name: Punish Ray
Halberd.description:
Cast a magic using the Halberd to resemble a staff. Deal magic damage affected by ATK. Critical Rates of the next 3 skills increases.
Halberd
2x Power

Halberd.name: Blitz Spike
Halberd.description:
A swift spear thrust wrapped in lightning. Chance to inflict [Paralysis] when activated near the target. If paralyzed, the target will take additional magic damage. When activated at a distance, lightning spears that automatically attack approaching enemies will be summoned.
Lightning Hail

Halberd.name: Lightning Hail
Halberd.description:
A spear technique that summons multiple lightning strikes from the sky. Generates multiple attacks that deal magic damage around the target. More likely to hit paralyzed targets.
Grants invincibility to yourself when activated.
Thor's Hammer

Halberd.name: Thor's Hammer
Halberd.description:
A spear technique that calls down a massive lightning strike. A magic attack with guaranteed critical, but the damage will be split among targets caught in the blast. Once activated, your Additional Magic, Magic Pierce, and Accuracy Rate will increase for a certain period of time.
Halberd
Accuracy Rate increases according to INT.
The skill "Lightning Hail" will leave a lightning trail, and when Thor's Hammer is activated, additional magic damage will be generated.
Halberd Mastery

Halberd.name: Halberd Mastery
Halberd.description: Get better at using Halberds. ATK increases when you equip a Halberd.

Halberd.name: Critical Spear
Halberd.description: Learn the mastery of Halberds. Critical Rate increases when you equip a Halberd.

Halberd.name: Tornado Lance
Halberd.description:
Gains 1 unit of tornado power when a halberd skill hits.
Your halberd gets stronger as you accumulate more tornado power. Half of the tornado power will be lost if attacked.
Halberd
[About Tornado Power]
Increases halberd's critical damage, chance of additional attack and guaranteed hit as it accumulates.
When the tornado power is lost due to getting attacked, dodge rate increases according to the value of power lost.

Halberd.name: Quick Aura
Halberd.description:
Increase your speed with the fighting spirit. Activate this skill by consuming HP instead of MP. Increase ASPD for a certain period of time.
Halberd
HP Cost -5%
Duration +120sec.

Halberd.name: War Cry of Struggle
Halberd.description:
The roar of life in a critical situation. Restore MP a little. The amount of the MP restoration increases as the current HP is low.
Halberd
Charge Time is shortened.

Halberd.name: Godspeed Wield
Halberd.description:
Consumes MaxMP and able to stack 3 times at most. Enhances ASPD/Action Speed/Evasion Recharge for a short time and greatly decreases Physical & Magic Resistance. The effect ends when taking damage.
Halberd
Boost on ASPD Buff
Reduce the decrease of Physical Resistance
Reduce the decrease of Magic Resistance
Duration +30sec

Halberd.name: Almighty Wield
Halberd.description:
Alleviates the amount of each resistance decreased due to the skill "Godspeed Wield". Chance to gain invincibility (
based on AGI
) when taking damage. This effect may trigger (
once every 10 seconds
). Also grants a passive effect that boosts the physical damage of Halberd skills.
Halberd
"Almighty Wield III" will be usable after acquiring Lv1.
"Almighty Wield II" will be usable after acquiring Lv5.
"Almighty Wield I" will be usable after acquiring Lv10.
Immediately gets 2 stacks of Godspeed Wield when using II and it won't stack more than that even if the skill is used again. After using II, you can reduce the effect by using I.

Halberd.name: Buster Lance
Halberd.description: Attack by throwing a spear from a distance. The further you are from the target, the weaker it is. The skill will change if certain conditions are met and the distance-based power depletion will also be minimized.

Mononofu.name: Issen
Mononofu.description: Slash an enemy at a blinding speed. High Critical Rate at the second hit.

Mononofu.name: Pulse Blade
Mononofu.description: Slash an enemy with an aerial slash at a distance. The damage decreases as you get further away from the target. You can move when sheathing the katana.

Mononofu.name: Triple Thrust
Mononofu.description: Quickly approach and thrust a target. Move behind a target when attacking. Increases the damage of the next skill a little.

Mononofu.name: Hasso Happa
Mononofu.description: Slash all enemies in a certain space. Deal damage to enemies around you without fail. You can move when sheathing the katana.

Mononofu.name: Tenryu Ransei
Kasumisetsu Getsuka
Mononofu.description:
Attacks the target with a series of slashes and greatly reduces the damage received while it is active.
Performs a special attack if Tenryu Ransei is in effect, and the number of times it is used determines the duration of the power increase.

Mononofu.name: Garyou Tensei
Mononofu.description:
The ultimate slash. The power increases every time you use certain Mononofu Skills. (
10 Times at Most
) Power increases against targets inflicted with [Armor Break].
Critical Rate is extremely low.
Katana
The power of Mononofu skills increases as Garyou Tensei's buff increases.
Upon skill activation, all accumulated Garyou Tensei's buff will be consumed and you will enter a damage reduction state. During this state, the power of Mononofu skills will remain at maximum.
It will be reset when "Gust" ends.

Mononofu.name: Shadowless Slash
Mononofu.description: Rapidly slashes the enemy. It's so fast that even the enemy doesn't know when the katana leaves its scabbard. Attacks with high accuracy and grants 2 of Garyou Tensei's buffs. You can move when sheathing the katana.

Mononofu.name: Pommel Strike
Mononofu.description: Strike an enemy with the pommel. Chance to inflict [Paralysis]. Chance to inflict [Stun] if the target is paralyzed.

Mononofu.name: Magadachi
Mononofu.description:
Parry an enemy's attack and reduce damage only once. Nullify ailments, recover MP a little, and at least 1 HP remains when taking fatal damage at certain amount of HP. Just deal damage if you don't parry.
MP restored decreases if used with combo.

Mononofu.name: Zantei Settetsu
Mononofu.description: Furiously slash an enemy taking its attack. Nullify damage once and do additional attack. Chance to inflict [Armor Break] with it.

Mononofu.name: Bushido
Mononofu.description:
Learn how to be a Mononofu. HP, MP and Accuracy increase a little. ATK increases when equipping a Katana.
Side note:
(the following notes are not part of this or any other Mononofu passive, rather being hidden innate effects of
Main Katana
)
โ€ข
Auto Attacks
of
Main Katana
are treated as
Unsheathe Attacks
โ€ข You can
slide
to any direction after an auto attack by using movement input
during the auto attack animation
if your are
not afflicted
with [Slow] or [Stop]; the same
slide
can also be performed after certain
Mononofu Skills
(conditions are listed within the info of said skills)
โ€ข After performing a
slide
, gains a buff that lasts until you perform an
auto attack
; the auto attack that consumes the buff will have its damage
doubled
, gains 50% bonus AMPR, will
always deal critical hits
, and give 1
Garyou Tensei stack
โ€ข This
slide
action can be disabled by equipping
Sprint Sheathe Remover
registlet

Mononofu.name: Shukuchi
Mononofu.description:
A technique to move fast. Quickly move within the range when doing normal attacks. Increase the ability of the next normal attack. Unavailable during [Slow/Stop].
Katana
Available with Katana Skills

Mononofu.name: Nukiuchi Sennosen
Mononofu.description: A sword-drawing technique that is like a miracle. When not attacking for a certain period of time, the normal attack with Shukuchi will be greatly enhanced. The less HP you have, the more powerful it is.

Mononofu.name: Two-Handed
Mononofu.description:
Wield the weapon with both hands. Various stats are enhanced if Sub-Weapon is empty. Critical Damage with a Katana greatly increases.
Katana
2x Boost on Critical Rate
2x Boost on Stability Boost

Mononofu.name: Meikyo Shisui
Mononofu.description:
Sharpen your focus. Critical Rate greatly increases for a short time and Critical Damage, DEF, and MDEF decrease. The effect ends when you use a skill.
Katana
2x Duration
Critical Rate Boost +25
No Decrease in Critical Damage.

Mononofu.name: Kairiki Ranshin
Mononofu.description:
Release the demonic power inside. Increase ATK/Attack MP Recovery/Normal Attack Power. Enhance Defense Pierce/Critical Rate of Garyou Tensei.
Inflict [Ignition] on yourself when activated.
Katana
Normal Attack Power +50
3x Duration

Mononofu.name: Dauntless
Mononofu.description: A strong determination to confront the enemy. Dauntless automatically accumulates when fighting against a powerful enemy. Grants various buffs for every 10 Dauntless points accumulated. Defeating the enemy consumes its counts and it will deplete over time.

Mononofu.name: Auspicious Wind
Mononofu.description:
Activates by chance when your attack misses or when you manage to dodge with Evasion. For 30 sec, Close-range ATK power/Critical Damage/Accuracy slightly increases, max 3 stacks.
The effect increases based on the Mononofu skill tree level.
Gust

Mononofu.name: Gust
Mononofu.description:
Assumes a dual-katana stance. Removes and converts Unsheathe Power into ATK and Weapon ATK. Reactivating Gust while it's in effect will produce a different effect based on the key input.
The effect ends when you move while sheathing your katana.
Katana
Still Wind, Northerly Wind, Easterly Wind, Westerly Wind and Southerly Wind can be activated with key input without ending the effect of Meikyo Shisui.
After assuming the "Still Wind" stance, you can still transition into the corresponding skill with a key input. (
MP is only consumed when activating Still Wind
)
Zephyr Rush

Mononofu.name: Zephyr Rush
Mononofu.description:
Escapes danger like a sudden breeze (
only while in Gust state
). Gains invincibility while in the air, then descends and performs a slash after some time or upon key input. The power increases based on the duration of invincibility,
but it will be a MISS if there's no target at the landing point.
Super Gust

Mononofu.name: Super Gust
Mononofu.description:
Improves dual-wielding technique through daily training.
Increases the power of "Gust's" normal attack (all 3 stages) and all skills it changes to.
Bouncing Blade

Mononofu.name: Bouncing Blade
Mononofu.description: A defense technique using scabbard. A counterattack is carried out 1 time only if you get hurt while holding a scabbard. If successful, some HP will be restored. MP Cost of the next skill used is reduced and accuracy increases.

Barehand.name: Unarmed Mastery
Barehand.description:
Only usable when no Main or Sub-Weapon is equipped.
The essence of unarmed combat. Gain Weapon ATK based on character's level. Also increase qi limit.
Important note:
โ€ข
You must have both Main Weapon Slot and Sub-Weapon Slot empty
in order to use any of the Bare Hand Skills
โ€ข Using any
non-Bare Hand skill
will consume 20% of current
Accumulate Qi
(rounded down, minimum 1); this can only be reduced by the passive
Ultima Qi Charge

Barehand.name: Qi Charge
Barehand.description:
Only usable when no Main or Sub-Weapon is equipped.
Use up MP to accumulate qi. ATK increases for 180 sec based on qi accumulated and Stability increases regardless of Qi amount.

Barehand.name: Lion Rage
Barehand.description:
Only usable if no Main or Sub-Weapon is equipped.
Boost Normal Attack and Critical Rate with qi for 30 sec at the cost of greatly lowered ASPD.
Using another qi technique will end the effect.

Barehand.name: Ultima Lion Rage
Barehand.description:
Raises Lion Rage effect to boost Normal Attack. If a critical hit is inflicted while Lion Rage is active, the effect that enhances attack skills will be accumulated.
But if Internal Elixir is activated, the power will vanish.

Barehand.name: Raving Storm
Barehand.description:
Only usable when no Main or Sub-Weapon is equipped.
Boost Accuracy, ASPD, ATK MP Recovery and movement speed with qi for 30 sec.
Using another qi technique ends the effect.

Barehand.name: Ultima Raving Storm
Barehand.description:
When Raving Storm activates, Physical Pierce and chance to trigger Additional Melee are raised. The effect ends when a non-Bare Hand skill is used, but the MP Cost will be halved.
The effect is also lost when Internal Elixir activates.

Barehand.name: Internal Elixir
Barehand.description:
Only usable when no Main or Sub-Weapon is equipped.
Use qi to recover HP for a certain period of time and reduce damage received. Attack power goes down and damage from poison increases while it is in effect.
Using another qi technique ends the effect.

Barehand.name: Clash of Enmity
Barehand.description:
Only usable if no Main or Sub-Weapon is equipped.
If you and a target are pulling aggro towards each other, the damage taken from the target will be reduced. Chance to prevent qi consumption if you receive damage while Internal Elixir is active.

Barehand.name: Miracle Comeback
Barehand.description:
When Internal Elixir is not activated and you get knocked out, it may auto-activate and restore your HP.
Once activated, it won't reactivate for some time.
Ultima Qi Charge

Barehand.name: Ultima Qi Charge
Barehand.description: Mitigates qi consumption when using skills other than Bare Hand Skills and slightly increases Attack MP Recovery.

Barehand.name: Hidden Talent
Barehand.description:
If there are no slots, just hold them.
Equips 3 crystas and get the ability of the 2 corresponding crystas when Lion Rage/Raving Storm/Internal Elixir activates.
Earthshaker

Barehand.name: Earthshaker
Barehand.description:
Only usable when no Main or Sub-Weapon is equipped.
Get a barrier according to the qi accumulated by this skill. Increase all elemental advantages, physical pierce, and stability.
The effect ends when Internal Elixir is used.

Crusher.name: Forefist Punch
Crusher.description: A sharp straight punch. Inflict critical damage to target. Reduce damage received 1 time only while the effect is active.

Crusher.name: Goliath Punch
God Hand
Divine Rigid Body
Breathwork
Crusher.description:
A technique to control your breathing quickly. Immediately restores your HP when activated. HP is also restored when the next skill activates.
Breathwork resilience declines for a while.

Crusher.name: Floating Kick
Crusher.description:
Fly from a distance to kick target. Increases critical damage when used normally, and it will hit the target without fail if used while moving.
Critical damage only goes up to a certain value.

Crusher.name: Geyser Kick
Crusher.description: A terrifyingly fast and powerful flying kick. The skill mechanism changes depending on distance. When activated from a long distance, the power increases and additionally the Breathwork acquired will be activated.

Crusher.name: Combination
Crusher.description: Performs quick consecutive punches. This skill has "normal attack proration". Critical rate increases as skill level goes up.

Crusher.name: Annihilator
Crusher.description:
The essence of destruction. Learn this skill to get a
passive effect
that raises Breathwork's HP recovery amount. Reduce MP Cost of the next skill used when it's Lv10.
Use knuckles as main weapon to get additional effect.
Knuckle
[The following effects are for Main Equipment Only]
While active, Weapon ATK increases and the chance to inflict Armor Break from "Shell Break" increases, but stability decreases, and Flinch/Tumble/Stun/Knock Back can no longer be inflicted on the target.

Crusher.name: Terrablast
Crusher.description:
A technique to crush the earth and use the uplifted bedrock as a shield. Deals damage to your surroundings and gets a barrier based on the HP consumed for 10 seconds. (
Can't be overwritten
). Critical is guaranteed if Annihilator is in effect and the target is inflicted with Armor Break.
Knuckle
The power of Terrablast will not increase due to the effect of God Hand, but MP will be slightly restored when the skill hits.

Sprite.name: Auto-Device
Sprite.description:
A technique allowing magic device to assist attack.
Performs a normal attack on target after being idle for 60 seconds.
Efficiency reduced for long-range (8m or more).

Sprite.name: Express Aid
Sprite.description:
Raises and rushes the output of magic device.
Increases traveling speed toward the target of "First Aid" and reduces damage received up to a certain number of times.

Sprite.name: Micro Heal
Sprite.description:
Sharing a little comfort.
Slightly restores your HP and the HP of the party member who has lost the most HP.

Sprite.name: Resurrection
Sprite.description:
A secret technique to resuscitate those who can no longer fight. The waiting time for those around you (
within 16m
) to revive instantly becomes 0 s.
*Not available if First Aid is not applicable.
*Not usable with combo.

Sprite.name: Enhance
Stabiliz
Sprite.description: A technique that improves accuracy. Increases the stability of Critical Rate and Magic Damage, and mitigates the decrease in stability of Graze hits for 45 seconds. Removes [Fatigue] when activated.

Sprite.name: Sprite Upgrade
Sprite.description:
Extends the duration of Auto-Device, Counterforce, Astral Lance, and Stabiliz.
Sprite Shield

Sprite.name: Sprite Shield
Sprite.description: A secret technique to convert energy into mana. Consumes HP to instantly restore 100 MP. Reduces the damage taken next and the chance of being inflicted with a status ailment.

Sprite.name: Counterforce
Astral Lance
Sprite.description:
An attack technique that efficiently recycles depleted mana.
Attacks by releasing a powerful magic lance for every 500 MP consumed for 90 seconds. (
max 1 lance
)

Sprite.name: Magic Vulcan
Sprite.description: A revolving magic cannon technique. Inflicts consecutive magic damage to the target. MP can be consumed additionally to continue attacking, but the power will diminish bit by bit. This attack does not cause proration.

Sprite.name: Cursed Altar
Sprite.description:
Devours the soul with a curse.
Puts a "curse" on the target. If successful, an effect that continuously deals damage to the target is additionally applied (
damage is reduced against bosses
).
Ignition

Sprite.name: Ignition
Sprite.description:
Attacks by causing the opponent's mana to burn. Deals unstable magic damage. Low chance to inflict [Weaken]. The chance increases with higher DEX and Sprite skill tree level.
Terrawrym

Sprite.name: Terrawrym
Sprite.description:
Fires a magic projectile that ambushes from underground. A magic projectile is sent crawling along the ground toward the target and triggers a small AoE when it hits. Passes through any targets in the way and inflicts [Stop] on them.
Faux Weapon

Sprite.name: Faux Weapon
Sprite.description:
Wields a weapon created with mana.
Targets a single enemy. The power increases with higher AGI and DEX.
Slash Reaper

Sprite.name: Slash Reaper
Sprite.description:
Protects yourself from looming danger with magical blades.
If conditions are met, the number of magical blades increases (
up to 99, max 5 deployed at once
). Reusing the skill sends the deployed magical blades to strike the target.
Lebenglanz

Sprite.name: Lebenglanz
Sprite.description:
A forbidden technique that reverses the phase of life that is lost to create explosive power.
Puts a "Life Bomb" on the target. It explodes and deals damage when the effect ends.
Magic Device
"Life Bomb" debuff
Boosts Attack MP Recovery for party members attacking the target with this debuff, and accumulates a portion of the MP used when attacking.
Deals damage based on accumulated MP and restores HP of nearby party members upon explosion.
